use_cases: Displaying interactive 3D scenes and animations in web applications
Embedding immersive Spline 3D experiences as page content
Creating interactive product showcases or virtual tours
Adding engaging 3D visual content to marketing landing pages
Incorporating Spline designer content into React applications
ai_summary: A minimal wrapper component for embedding Spline 3D scenes via iframe. The component provides a full-width, full-height dark container with a subtle border and shadow for displaying interactive 3D content created in Spline editor. Popular for SaaS landing pages, product showcases, and immersive web experiences.
